entries.name: Claude-Code-Agent-Monitor
entries.description: 🚀 A real-time monitoring dashboard for Claude Code, built with SQLite3, Node.js, Express, React, Vite, TailwindCSS, and WebSockets. It tracks sessions, agent activity, tool usage, and subagent orchestration, providing live analytics, a Kanban status board, status notifications, a cute buddy, and an interactive web UI/MacOS/Windows native app.
